moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Final Day
moments.blurb: The Gentlemen's Singles Final at Wimbledon 2026 takes place today, Sunday, July 12th, closing out two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Final Showdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The Wimbledon Men's Singles Final is live today. Who will lift the trophy and make history at SW19?

angles.name: Sunday Centre Court
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) and Centre Court is ready. The Wimbledon Men's Final is the ultimate Sunday spectacle in London.

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its tournament days on Thursday, July 16th, running until July 19th at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with practice rounds starting today.

angles.name: Golf Major Week
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is on the line! The Open Championship officially gets underway this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick to be Champion Golfer of the Year?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: All eyes on Southport this week as Royal Birkdale hosts The Open. The practice rounds are already in full swing for golf's oldest major.

moments.title: System Of A Down in London
moments.blurb: Nu-metal legends System Of A Down are playing two massive London shows at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on July 13th and 15th, their first UK appearance in years.

angles.name: SOAD Live
angles.copy: System Of A Down are back! Catch them live at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Monday and Wednesday for their first London gigs in over a decade. Get ready to bounce!

angles.name: London Rocks
angles.copy: Tottenham Hotspur Stadium is bracing for two nights of pure System Of A Down energy this week. Who's heading to see the legends?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, known for its vibrant folk and roots music, takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland from July 15th to 18th.

angles.name: HebCelt Kicks Off
angles.copy: Get ready for the sound of the islands! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts this Wednesday in Stornoway, bringing incredible music and culture to the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Folk & Roots Fest
angles.copy: Midweek escape to the Hebrides for some of the best folk and roots music at the Hebridean Celtic Festival, running Wednesday to Saturday.

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Wales
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a multi-genre music and arts festival with over 130 acts, is held in the Monmouthshire countryside, Wales from July 16th to 19th.

angles.name: Wales Gets Big Love
angles.copy: Monmouthshire is about to get a whole lot of love! Big Love Festival kicks off this Thursday, bringing an amazing lineup of music and arts to the Welsh countryside.

angles.name: Weekend Escape Wales
angles.copy: Looking for a festival escape? Big Love Festival runs Thursday to Sunday in Monmouthshire, promising diverse music and good vibes!

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, brings five stages of music across all genres to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18th to 19th.

angles.name: Nottingham's Splendour
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is back and taking over Wollaton Hall next weekend! Two days of amazing music across every genre, who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Festival Vibes Nottingham
angles.copy: Five stages, all genres! Splendour Festival hits Nottingham next Saturday and Sunday. Get ready for a huge weekend of live music.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a major multi-genre camping festival combining music, comedy, and arts, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Latitude Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost time! Latitude Festival kicks off next week in Suffolk with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi leading the lineup. Are you ready for Henham Park?

angles.name: Festival Planning
angles.copy: Just over a week until Latitude Festival! Who are you most excited to see on the bill? From music to comedy, it's all happening.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's duet 'Rein Me In' held the UK Official Singles Chart Number 1 spot for its 16th non-consecutive week on Friday, July 10th, becoming the longest-running British Number 1 single of all time.

angles.name: Chart History Made
angles.copy: Huge congratulations to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' just became the longest-running British Number 1 single ever on the UK chart. Incredible achievement! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Fender & Dean Reign
angles.copy: 16 weeks at Number 1! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' has officially made UK chart history. What a track!

moments.title: New UK TV Buzz This July
moments.blurb: Several new British TV shows are generating buzz for July releases, including the ITV thriller 'The Dark,' BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' starring Diane Morgan, and the fifth season of Apple TV+'s 'Trying.'

angles.name: Summer Binge Watch
angles.copy: Looking for your next TV obsession? July is delivering with new shows like ITV's 'The Dark,' BBC's 'Ann Droid,' and 'Trying' Season 5 on Apple TV+ all creating buzz.

angles.name: Must-Watch July TV
angles.copy: From gripping thrillers to witty comedies, there's plenty of new British TV to dive into this July. What's on your watch list?

moments.title: Happy 79th Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Friday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: He will, he will, rock you! Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Sir Brian May, this Friday! What's your favourite Queen riff?

angles.name: Queen's Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May on Friday! His guitar work defined an era and continues to inspire. #Queen

moments.title: Happy 79th Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Mexican-American guitar icon Carlos Santana, known for pioneering Latin rock with his band Santana, turns 79 on Saturday, July 20th.

angles.name: Latin Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday this Saturday to the incredible Carlos Santana! His guitar work is instantly recognisable and truly legendary. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating the 79th birthday of the magnificent Carlos Santana on Saturday! A true musical innovator whose sound transcends generations. #Santana

moments.title: Happy 78th Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: British folk-rock singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on Sunday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon Turns 78
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Cat Stevens, aka Yusuf Islam, this Sunday! His timeless songs continue to resonate. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Wild World of Yusuf
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens on Sunday! From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', his music is pure poetry. #YusufIslam

moments.title: Happy 79th Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, founding member, drummer, and lead vocalist of The Eagles, and a successful solo artist, turns 79 on Monday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend's Day
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrates! Happy 79th birthday to The Eagles' iconic drummer and vocalist, Don Henley, this Monday! What's your favourite Eagles track?

angles.name: Boys of Summer Turn 79
angles.copy: Monday marks the 79th birthday of Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer', his voice is unmistakable. #TheEagles

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Summer holidays are beginning for many schools across the UK this week and next, marking the start of the long break for students and families.

angles.name: School's Out For Summer
angles.copy: The school gates are closing for summer! Many students across the UK are now officially on their holidays. What are your summer plans?

angles.name: Devon Summer Break
angles.copy: It's official: Summer holidays have begun for many schools across Devon! Wishing all students and families a fantastic break. #DevonSummer
